batchCrop.description: Crop multiple product images to consistent marketplace-ready frames.

batchCrop.title: Batch Crop Tool
batchCrop.subtitle: Upload multiple images, adjust each crop, and export a ZIP in one pass.
batchCrop.applyToAllSuccess: Applied the current crop transform to all images.
batchCrop.emptyDescription: Use JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WEBP files. Up to 50 files, 20 MB each.
batchCrop.emptyEditorDescription: Your crop workspace will appear here after upload.
batchCrop.editorHint: Move the image behind the fixed frame, then export from the original file.
batchCrop.applyToAll: Apply current crop to all images

errors.tooMany: Batch Crop supports up to 50 images at a time.
errors.tooLarge: Each crop image must be 20 MB or smaller.
errors.invalidType: Only JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WEBP images are supported.
errors.loadFailed: One or more images could not be loaded.
errors.invalidCustomSize: Custom width and height must be greater than zero.
errors.cropNotReady: Crop data is still loading. Adjust the image and try again.
errors.exportFailed: Could not export the cropped ZIP.

backgroundRemover.title: Background Remover Tool
backgroundRemover.subtitle: Upload product shots and process transparent PNG cutouts when the backend service is available.
backgroundRemover.zipSuccess: Processed PNG files exported as ZIP.
backgroundRemover.emptyDescription: Use JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WEBP files. Up to 20 files, 15 MB each.
backgroundRemover.emptyPreviewDescription: Original and processed previews will appear here.
backgroundRemover.resultPendingDescription: Process an image to preview the transparent PNG output.

errors.tooMany: Background Remover supports up to 20 images at a time.
errors.tooLarge: Each background removal image must be 15 MB or smaller.
errors.invalidType: Only JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WEBP images are supported.
errors.unexpectedResult: The background remover did not return a usable PNG result.
errors.zipFailed: Could not export the processed ZIP.
